word: H7337 - רָחַב - râchab - raw-khab' - Be an en- large

sections.paragraph:
Original: רחב

Transliteration: râchab

Phonetic: raw-khab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be or grow wide, be or grow large
    1. (Qal) to be widened, be enlarged
    2. (Niphal) broad or roomy pasture (participle)
    3. (Hiphil)
      1. to make large
      2. to enlarge

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2143

Part(s) of speech: Verb
